summary: Implements all 6 specs from .specs/thoughtbox-v1-finalstretch/: hook-based tool event capture (SPEC-HOOK-CAPTURE), connection tracking (SPEC-CONNECTION-TRACKING), TypeScript project model parser (SPEC-PROJECT-MODEL), blast radius event enrichment (SPEC-BLAST-RADIUS), CLI init command (SPEC-CLI-INIT), and notebook RLM REPL extensions (SPEC-NOTEBOOK-RLM). Adds a new thoughtbox CLI npm package, Supabase connections table, and extends the notebook module with variable cells, REPL globals, and IPC-based sub_call.

claims.statement: PostToolUse hook script captures tool events as OTLP log records and sends to /v1/logs via detached curl
claims.evidence_description: 5 tests verify hook parses tool events (Read, Edit, Bash), exits silently without API key, and handles malformed JSON without crashing.

claims.statement: TypeScript project parser discovers modules, extracts exports, and detects dependency edges from both imports and re-exports
claims.evidence_description: 5 tests verify module discovery from directories with index.ts, export extraction, dependency edge detection (including re-export statements), file counting, and error on missing tsconfig.

claims.statement: Variable cells support store/peek with budget enforcement and .src.md round-tripping
claims.evidence_description: 7 tests verify store/peek round-trip, in-place update, slicing, 100K char limit, 100 cell limit, missing variable error, and export/import round-trip.

claims.statement: REPL globals (store, peek, vars, FINAL, print) work inside executed code cells via IPC
claims.evidence_description: 4 tests verify store+peek via IPC, vars() listing, FINAL() setting notebook result, and print() output capture.

claims.statement: ModuleCache resolves file paths to modules via longest-prefix matching
claims.evidence_description: 6 tests verify correct module resolution, untracked file handling, nested files, absolute paths, exact path match, and partial prefix rejection.

claims.statement: Settings merge creates, appends, and updates Thoughtbox hook entries without overwriting existing hooks
claims.evidence_description: 5 tests verify creating hooks from empty settings, appending without overwriting, updating in place, adding env vars, and preserving existing env vars.
